# Tests Directory

This directory contains the organized test infrastructure for the RIS HR System.

## Structure

- `scripts/` - Executable test scripts (Playwright/Node.js)
- `docs/` - Test documentation, manuals, and checklists
- `results/` - Test outputs (screenshots, JSON, reports)

## Key Commands

```bash
# Run Benefits tab tests
npx playwright test tests/scripts/test-benefits-tab.js

# Run Scorecard tab tests
node tests/scripts/test-scorecard-tab.js

# Run Profile Details tests
node tests/scripts/test-profile-details.js
```

## Output Paths

All scripts save to standardized locations:
- Screenshots: `tests/results/screenshots/`
- JSON results: `tests/results/json/`
- Reports: `tests/results/reports/`
